name: contact-crud-sqlite
description: Full contact lifecycle on SQLite backend
when: Add contact with name, email, phone, fields, tags; list all; list by tag; list with limit; show by prefix; edit name/email/field/tags; show edited; remove; list after removal
then: Each operation succeeds; list returns filtered results; show displays full detail; edit preserves untouched fields; remove deletes permanently

name: company-crud-sqlite
description: Full company lifecycle on SQLite backend
when: Add company with name, domain, fields, tags; list all; filter by tag; show; edit name/domain/field/tags; show edited; remove; list after removal
then: Same behavior as contacts; edit merges fields (preserves existing, updates changed); tags replaced wholesale on edit

name: relationships
given: Contacts and companies exist in database
when: Link contact to company (works_at); link contact to contact (knows); show both endpoints; unlink one relationship; show after unlink
then: Relationships visible from both source and target entities; unlink removes only the targeted relationship

name: fts5-search
description: Full-text search across contacts and companies
given: Contacts with various names, emails, fields; companies with names and domains
when: Search by name, email substring, field content (e.g. 'CTO'), domain, tag word in fields
then: FTS5 matches across name, email, and fields JSON content; company search matches name and domain

name: markdown-backend
description: Full lifecycle on markdown file backend
when: Add contact; add company; verify .md files on disk; link entities; show with relationships; edit; search; delete; verify file removed
then: YAML frontmatter files created under contacts/ and companies/; _relationships.yaml tracks links; edit updates frontmatter; delete removes file

name: error-handling
description: Edge cases produce clean error messages
when: Show with prefix < 6 chars; show nonexistent prefix; show nonexistent UUID; add with no name; link with no --type; list with nonexistent tag
then: Short prefix: 'at least 6 characters'; not found: 'contact not found'; missing args: usage shown; missing flag: 'required flag not set'; empty tag: 'No contacts found'

name: unicode-support
description: Unicode names, emails, and tags work correctly
when: Add contact with accented name (José García-López), unicode tag (español); search by unicode name
then: Contact created and searchable with unicode characters intact

name: mcp-server
description: MCP server initializes and handles tool calls
when: Send initialize request; send tools/list; send tools/call for list_contacts with tag filter
then: Server responds with capabilities (logging, prompts, resources, tools); lists 12 tools with schemas; tool call returns filtered JSON results
